<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Search project content"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/api/v1/projects/{slug}/search/"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Semantic search across indexed project content. Returns ranked results with snippets.

**Required permission:** `project_search` (private projects only).

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
